name: Sourdough Wheat Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the whole wheat flour and all-purpose flour.
2. Add the milk, margarine or butter, sugar, and salt to the flour mixture. Stir until combined.
3. Mix in the sourdough starter and bread flour until well incorporated.
4. Add the yeast and stir gently to combine.
5. Cover the bowl with a damp towel and let it rest at room temperature for 30 minutes.
6. Transfer the dough to your bread machine or mix bowl, depending on your method.
7. Follow your bread machine's instructions or continue mixing by hand until the dough is smooth and elastic.
8. Shape the dough into a loaf and place it in a greased bread pan.
9. Cover the pan with a damp towel and let it rise at room temperature for 1-2 hours, or until doubled in size.
10. Preheat your oven to 375°F (190°C).
11. Place the risen dough in the oven and bake for 30-35 minutes, or until golden brown and sounds hollow when tapped on the bottom.
12. Remove from the oven and let cool before slicing and serving.
